ALTHOUGH JUDGMENT DOES NOT STATE STAY OF EXECUTION 0F 3/1/95, IT IS STATED IN THE STIPULATION AND CLERK'S MINUTES, PLTF'S ATTY SAID THE OMISSION IS BY MISTAKE, SO CLEKR ENTERED STAY IN THE JUDGMENT.
